description: Artifacts use over-broad paths with no expire_in, capturing secrets and exhausting storage.
body: Failure mode: a job sets artifacts:paths too broadly (e.g. the whole workspace) with no expire_in, so it uploads generated secret files, .env, or caches as durable artifacts that any downstream job or user can download, while storage grows without bound. Detection signals: artifacts containing credential or .env files; no expire_in set; storage usage climbing; downstream jobs receiving unexpected files. Do not upload broad artifact paths without expiry. Safer fallback: list artifacts:paths to only the required outputs, set expire_in, exclude secret files, and verify the artifact contents contain no credentials before relying on the job.
